commandPalette.label: Command menu
commandPalette.placeholder: Search pages, type > for commands, @ for projects...

dropOverlay.title: Release to upload files
dropOverlay.description: Files will be routed to the current Create or Library surface.
dropOverlay.wrongPage: Upload files from a Create or Library page.
dropOverlay.noFiles: No files were found in the drop.
dropOverlay.createNoTarget: No compatible upload field is available on this Create page.

emptyProjects.title: {count, plural, one {# empty project can be cleaned up} other {# empty projects can be cleaned up}}
emptyProjects.description: These projects have no linked tasks and were created more than 24 hours ago.
emptyProjects.cleanedUp: {count, plural, one {Cleaned up # empty project.} other {Cleaned up # empty projects.}}
emptyProjects.noneSelected: No empty projects were selected for cleanup.

projectSwitcher.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? {taskCount} linked tasks will also be deleted.
projectSwitcher.deleteConfirmDescriptionEmpty: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?

createHero.title: What kind of video do you want to create?
createHero.description: Start with a simple idea or choose one of the specialized pipelines below to generate the full video automatically.
createHero.quickDescription: The fastest way to generate a video. Describe the idea and let the system write the script, voice it, and render the storyboard.
createHero.digitalHumanDescription: Generate a presenter-style video with a digital host, synchronized lip movement, and your narration.
createHero.i2vDescription: Animate one or more still images into short motion clips using media workflows.
createHero.actionTransferDescription: Transfer motion from a driver video onto a new target image or subject.
createHero.customDescription: Generate standalone assets such as voice, music, images, or short video segments scene by scene.

projectBar.empty: No project yet — create one to start

recentTasks.title: Recent Tasks
recentTasks.emptyNoProject: Select a project to view recent tasks

createCommon.projectRequiredDescription: This pipeline needs a project. Go to the project center to pick or create one, then try again.
createCommon.taskCancelledDescription: The generation task has been stopped.

runninghub.description: Shown only for RunningHub workflows. Keeping Platform Default uses the saved default or lets the platform choose automatically.

page.title: Project Center
page.description: Review, manage, and continue every project in one place.
page.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, ID, or pipeline

empty.title: No projects yet
empty.description: Create a project before you start creating or organizing assets.
empty.tabBatches: This project has no batches yet.
empty.tabTasks: This project has no tasks yet.
empty.tabVideos: This project has no videos yet.
empty.tabImages: This project has no images yet.
empty.tabVoices: This project has no voices yet.
empty.tabBgm: This project has no background music yet.
empty.tabScripts: This project has no scripts yet.

digitalHuman.title: Digital Human
digitalHuman.description: Upload a portrait, choose an optional voice workflow, and generate a presenter-style video.

placeholders.narration: Write the narration that the digital presenter should speak.

i2v.title: Image → Video
i2v.description: Upload a source image, define the motion, and render a short animated video clip.

placeholders.motionPrompt: Describe the motion, camera movement, or transformation to apply.

actionTransfer.title: Action Transfer
actionTransfer.description: Pair a driver video with a target image and transfer the motion into a new generated clip.

custom.title: Custom Asset
custom.description: Build a multi-scene asset run with independent media, narration, and duration for each scene.

placeholders.sceneNarration: Describe the narration or voiceover for this scene.

custom.sceneDescription: Upload media, add narration, and set the duration for this scene.

summary.sceneDetail: {count} scenes are configured. Each scene includes media, narration, and duration.

validation.duration: Duration must be at least 1 second.
validation.scenes: At least one scene is required.

quickIntent.placeholder: Describe your idea, for example: explain the Big Bang with pixel-art visuals...

quick.title: Quick
quick.description: The fastest video workflow. AI handles the script, voice, and visuals for you.
quick.topicPlaceholder: Describe the concept, audience, and visual direction you want to generate...
quick.bgmPlaceholder: Choose a background track from the library (optional)
quick.styleHelp: Sets the overall visual direction, prompt prefix, and default soundtrack.
quick.ttsHelp: Controls how narration is generated and which voice service or preset is used.
quick.mediaHelp: Controls which visual generation plan is used for images or short clips.
quick.bgmModeHelpNone: Skip background music when you only want narration or original audio.
quick.bgmModeHelpDefault: Reuse the current style's default track for the fastest setup.
quick.bgmModeHelpCustom: Choose a specific library track to override the default soundtrack.
quick.bgmHelpCustom: Pick a prepared track from your music library.
quick.bgmHelpNone: No background music will be added to this video.
quick.narrationPlaceholder: Leave blank to let AI generate the narration...
quick.promptPrefixPlaceholder: Append extra prompt guidance to every generated visual...
quick.projectRequiredDescription: Video generation must belong to a project. Select or create one from the project switcher in the header, then try again.
quick.cancelledMessage: The generation task has been stopped.
quick.requestFailed: The request failed. Please try again.
quick.mediaPreviewDescription: Test the voice, image, and short video outputs before you submit the full generation job.
quick.previewUnavailable: The current form state is not complete enough to generate a preview yet.

templates.title: Templates
templates.description: Browse runtime templates, inspect the static thumbnails, and open a live render preview before you launch Quick.
templates.emptyDescription: The template directory is currently empty.
templates.livePreviewDescription: Render the selected template with sample copy to validate layout and readability.
templates.noCustomParams: This template does not expose custom parameters.

presets.title: Preset Library
presets.description: Manage reusable creation setups, separate built-in defaults from your own presets, and jump straight back into the matching flow.
presets.emptyDescription: Create a preset to save a reusable configuration.
presets.name: Name
presets.presetJsonDescription: Inspect the saved configuration for this preset.

fieldDescriptions.name: Give this preset a clear name that will appear directly in the creation flows.
fieldDescriptions.pipeline: Choose the main creation flow this preset is meant for.
fieldDescriptions.description: Explain when this preset should be used.
fieldDescriptions.payloadTemplate: Provide the reusable JSON object that should be applied when the preset is used.

presets.pipelinePlaceholder: Choose the creation flow for this preset
presets.descriptionPlaceholder: Explain when this preset should be used
presets.payloadPlaceholder: Paste the reusable JSON configuration template
presets.deleteConfirmDescription: This permanently removes the personal preset.

overview.title: Workflow Library
overview.description: Browse every available generation plan by use case. The overview favors user-friendly names, scenarios, and sources; technical filenames move to the detail view.

tts.label: Voice Plans
tts.description: Plans used to generate narration, speech, and presenter audio.

media.label: Visual Plans
media.description: Plans used to generate frames, shots, and short video clips.

image.label: Image Processing
image.description: Image-focused plans used for still-image generation and compatibility flows.

overview.emptyDescription: No workflows are currently available for this category.

selfHost.title: Self-host Workflows
selfHost.description: Local ComfyUI services hosted inside your own runtime stack.
selfHost.emptyDescription: Connect a local workflow source to populate this catalog.

runningHub.title: RunningHub Workflows
runningHub.description: Cloud-hosted workflow endpoints delivered through the RunningHub connector.
runningHub.emptyDescription: Connect a cloud workflow source to populate this catalog.

workflowDetail.notFoundDescription: The requested workflow could not be loaded from the resources catalog.
workflowDetail.editJsonDescription: Only edit this configuration when you need to adjust nodes, parameters, or integration details.
workflowDetail.developerInfoDescription: These fields are mainly useful for troubleshooting, integration, or editing.
workflowDetail.descriptionFallback: This plan does not have a human-written usage note yet. Use the source, technical name, and key parameters to judge whether it fits your task.
workflowDetail.noParameters: The backend did not expose key parameters for this workflow.
workflowDetail.editorPlaceholder: Edit the full workflow JSON here...

videos.title: Videos
videos.description: Browse generated videos across projects, then reopen them for reuse or troubleshooting.
videos.emptyProjectTitle: This project has no generated videos yet.
videos.emptyDescription: Create a new video to start building your reusable video library.
videos.emptyProjectDescription: No completed or indexed videos are linked to {project}.

images.title: Images
images.description: Browse generated stills and portrait assets, then reuse them directly in Image → Video flows.
images.emptyProjectTitle: This project has no images yet.
images.emptyDescription: Create or upload an image through a pipeline to build a reusable image library.
images.emptyProjectDescription: No image assets are indexed for {project}.

dialog.title: Reuse image asset
dialog.description: Open a larger preview, copy the original prompt, or jump back into the Image → Video pipeline.
dialog.noPromptStored: No prompt snapshot stored for this asset.

voices.title: Voices
voices.description: Review generated voice tracks, listen inline, and reopen the Digital Human flow with the same narration settings.
voices.emptyProjectTitle: This project has no voice assets yet.
voices.emptyDescription: Generated TTS outputs will appear here once they have been synthesized by a pipeline.

bgm.title: Background Music
bgm.description: Switch between built-in tracks and your personal library, preview them, then bring one directly back into Quick.
bgm.emptyDescription: Built-in tracks come from the shared resources catalog; your own reused tracks appear after generation history is indexed.

styles.title: Styles
styles.description: Manage the style library used by Quick, including built-in styles and your own custom styles.
styles.editorDescription: Edit the base metadata, creative layer text, and runtime configuration for this style.
styles.searchPlaceholder: Search styles by name, ID, scene, or tone
styles.emptyDescription: Create a style to preserve reusable analysis layers, audio layers, and runtime configuration.
styles.detailDescription: Inspect the preview audio, creative layers, and config snapshots for this style.
styles.emptyLayer: Nothing has been configured for this section yet.
styles.invalidJson: Invalid JSON. Please fix the payload before saving.
styles.deleteDescription: This permanently deletes the custom style.

scripts.title: Scripts
scripts.description: Keep narration drafts, prompt drafts, and full scripts in one place, then reopen Quick with the content already filled in.
scripts.emptyProjectTitle: This project has no script history yet.
scripts.emptyDescription: Narration and prompt history will appear here after generation or assistive writing flows complete.

libraryVideoDetail.notFoundDescription: The requested video could not be found in the current library index or task store.
libraryVideoDetail.noSnapshot: No generation snapshot is available for this video.
libraryVideoDetail.noVideo: The video file is not available for preview yet.
libraryVideoDetail.deleteDescription: This removes the history entry and related artifact files. This action cannot be undone.
libraryVideoDetail.cancelTaskDescription: This task is still running. The only available action right now is cancellation.
libraryVideoDetail.storyboardEmpty: No storyboard data is available for this item.

page.title: Settings
page.description: Configure provider credentials, local presentation preferences, and runtime metadata.
page.backendUnavailableDescription: The workbench is showing safe defaults until `/api/settings` becomes reachable again.

storage.label: Storage
storage.description: Runtime paths, storage metrics, and cleanup tools.

projectDefaults.title: Project Defaults
projectDefaults.description: These values are persisted to the backend config file.

fieldDescriptions.projectName: Use this project name as the starting point when a new task does not specify one.
fieldDescriptions.defaultTemplate: New renders fall back to this template unless a task explicitly chooses another one.

llm.title: LLM
llm.description: Validate the API key, base URL, and current model against the provider before saving.

fieldDescriptions.apiKey: Used to access your OpenAI-compatible model provider.
fieldDescriptions.baseUrl: Usually the OpenAI-style endpoint exposed by the provider.
fieldDescriptions.model: The default model used for copy, prompts, and structured outputs.

comfyui.title: ComfyUI
comfyui.description: Probe the configured endpoint and credentials without saving the draft first.

fieldDescriptions.endpoint: Usually the local or LAN address of your ComfyUI service.
fieldDescriptions.apiKey: Fill this only if your ComfyUI instance requires authentication.

runninghub.title: RunningHub
runninghub.description: Verify the RunningHub API key against the official account status endpoint.

fieldDescriptions.apiKey: Used to access RunningHub cloud generation features.
fieldDescriptions.concurrency: Limits how many tasks can be submitted to RunningHub at once.
fieldDescriptions.instanceType: Used when task creation does not override the instance type.

validation.hint: Validation uses the current draft only and does not save settings.
validation.staleDescription: Configuration changed since the last validation.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: These preferences stay local to the browser session.
appearance.languageDescription: Switches the client UI language and persists to local storage.

storage.runtimePathsDescription: Runtime paths are intentionally read-only here. They document where generated assets are stored.

pathDescriptions.output: Final generated videos, images, and exported files.
pathDescriptions.temp: Intermediate files and temporary cache that can be cleaned up.
pathDescriptions.uploads: Source files uploaded into the workbench.

storage.statsDescription: Live runtime storage metrics from the backend.
storage.cleanupDescription: Cleanup removes failed task temporary files and recycle-bin content older than 30 days when available. Generated output, uploads, and saved presets are left intact.

cleanupDialog.title: Confirm storage cleanup
cleanupDialog.description: This removes safe cleanup targets such as failed task temporary files and expired recycle-bin content. It cannot delete generated output or uploaded source assets.

about.buildHealthDescription: Version data comes from `/health` plus the local frontend package metadata.
about.linksDescription: Reference destinations for source, docs, and feedback.
about.healthUnavailable: Backend health information is temporarily unavailable.
about.updateCurrent: You are running the latest known frontend build ({version}).

overview.title: Batch Overview
overview.description: Track throughput across batch runs, then drill into the latest batches to inspect progress or results.
overview.recentDescription: The five most recent batch submissions across all projects.
overview.emptyDescription: Create your first batch to start monitoring grouped task progress and outcomes.

list.title: All Batches
list.description: Review every batch, filter by status or project, and jump directly into the monitor view.
list.emptyDescription: No batches are currently visible for {project}.

queue.title: Task Queue
queue.description: Monitor project activity across pending, running, completed, failed, and cancelled tasks.

detail.notFoundDescription: The requested batch could not be found or has already been removed.
detail.emptyDescription: This batch does not currently have any visible child tasks to monitor.
detail.outputsDescription: Direct download links for completed tasks. ZIP bundling is deferred to a later phase.
detail.cancelDialogDescription: This will cancel unfinished child tasks and remove the batch from the active list.
detail.deleteDialogDescription: This will soft-delete the batch record. Child tasks are left untouched because the batch is already terminal.

new.title: New Batch
new.description: Pick a pipeline, define the shared batch settings, then add rows manually or import them from CSV.

steps.pipelineDescription: Select the pipeline that all rows in this batch will use.
steps.settingsDescription: Name the batch and choose which project should own the generated tasks.
steps.rowsDescription: {pipeline} rows map directly to the backend schema. CSV imports are capped at {limit} rows.

new.customCsvOnly: Custom Asset batches currently support CSV import only because each row contains a scenes array.

csv.uploadDescription: Header names must match the {pipeline} request fields exactly.
csv.emptyState: Upload a CSV to preview and validate its rows before submission.

summary.title: Submission Summary
summary.invalidDescription: {count} valid row(s) ready for {pipeline}. Resolve the invalid rows before submitting.

toasts.customRequiresCsv: Custom Asset batches currently require CSV import.
toasts.needValidRows: Add at least one valid batch row before submitting.
toasts.resolveInvalidRows: Resolve the invalid batch rows before submitting.
